The grill arrived without the Rotisserie attachment, even though this is a core feature of the model. When I contacted customer service, I was shocked to be told that the Middle East version “does not come with it,” unlike the U.S. and Canada models. This was never stated clearly on their website.

What made things worse is that I emailed them to resolve the issue and received no response at all. For a product that is already more expensive in the Middle East, the lack of transparency, poor communication, and zero follow-up is unacceptable.

This whole situation makes me seriously question their guarantee, after-sales support, and long-term commitment to the Saudi market. Based on my experience, I’m not confident they will be around for long if this is how they treat customers.
